Description: Fundamental behaviors that foster a respectful and harmonious community life.

Principles.Title: Respect for Others
Principles.Effect: Treating everyone with dignity regardless of their background, beliefs, or status.

Principles.Title: Public Decorum
Principles.Effect: Maintaining appropriate behavior in public spaces to avoid causing discomfort to others.

Principles.Title: Helping the Community
Principles.Effect: Aiding those in need creates a supportive social safety net.

Description: Responsibilities toward preserving and protecting our natural and shared surroundings.

Principles.Title: Waste Management
Principles.Effect: Keeping our environment clean prevents disease and preserves beauty.

Principles.Title: Resource Conservation
Principles.Effect: Mindful use of water, electricity, and fuel ensures sustainability for future generations.
BestPractices: Turn off lights when not in use

Principles.Title: Care for Public Property
Principles.Effect: Shared infrastructure like parks, transport, and monuments belong to everyone.

Description: Adhering to rules that ensure the safety and security of all citizens.

Principles.Title: Traffic Discipline
Principles.Effect: Following road rules saves lives and reduces congestion.

Principles.Title: Rule of Law
Principles.Effect: Respecting the legal system maintains order and justice in society.

Principles.Title: Emergency Response
Principles.Effect: Knowing how to act during crises can mitigate harm.
BestPractices: Stay calm and help others evacuate

Description: Responsible and ethical behavior in the digital world.

Principles.Title: Online Etiquette (Netiquette)
Principles.Effect: Creating a positive digital environment through respectful communication.

Principles.Title: Data Privacy & Security
Principles.Effect: Protecting your information and respecting others' privacy.
BestPractices: Do not share sensitive info of others

Principles.Title: Intellectual Property
Principles.Effect: Respecting the creative work and ownership of others.
